div.div:
Computational Properties1. Sparse activation: Top-2 of K=4
2. Sparsity ratio: k/K = 50% per token
3. Capacity factor: α = 1.25
4. D = dv = dt = 768
5. |V| = 64,000 (PhoBERT vocab)
6. Weight tying: We shared in
decoder embed. & output proj.
